extraction.one_line_summary: HEALY Ben soloed from 50km out after attacking 13-rider breakaway on first of two late climbs, while ROGLIC took 14 seconds on EVENEPOEL uphill.
tactical_patterns: HEALY attacked Breakaway precisely at 50km remaining on first Salita Capuchini climb before final classified ascent.
ROGLIC attacked GC group on final climb while EVENEPOEL faded, exploiting uphill weakness day before TT.
INEOS paired THOMAS and GEOGHEGAN HART together to attack EVENEPOEL rather than isolating single protected rider.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: showed first weakness of Giro on uphill finish, losing 14 seconds to Roglic/Ineos pairing day before his favored TT
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: attacked elite breakaway 50km from finish with confidence to solo, now second-youngest Irish GT stage winner
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: aggressive enough to attack and take time on Evenepoel uphill despite being down 30 seconds overall
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: INEOS deploying both GT winners Thomas/Hart together as attacking pair reveals strategic depth and Evenepoel concern
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: neutral: clung to pink by 8 seconds despite losing time, suggesting vulnerability in upcoming TT
